creator: gibbs@FreeBSD.org
text:
>	Sound works just fine until I suspend/resume my laptop, and then
>	it doesn't.  I get no sound at all, not even CDs can be heard.

The same thing happens here on a CS423x.  It seems that the volume levels
go to zero.  Touching wmixer seems to reset the volumes and all is well
again.

--
Justin
